sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The RIGHT action changed the board. Let me check what changed by comparing the before and after frames.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after RIGHT action
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in before['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after['nodes']}

# Compare node positions
print("Changes detected:")
for nid in after_nodes:
    bn = before_nodes.get(nid)
    an = after_nodes[nid]
    if bn and bn['boundary'] != an['boundary']:
        print(f"  Node {nid} ({an['color']}): boundary changed")
        print(f"    before: {bn['boundary']}")
        print(f"    after:  {an['boundary']}")

# Check ASCII diff in the region
before_lines = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
after_lines = last_transition.after_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i in range(20, 43):
    if before_lines[i] != after_lines[i]:
        print(f"\nRow {i} changed:")
        print(f"  before: {before_lines[i][8:55]}")
        print(f"  after:  {after_lines[i][8:55]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
